children.name: p
children.textContent: Kneel on left knee, push hips forward gently. Switch sides.

children.name: p
children.textContent: Arms extended, breathe deep into your lower back.

children.name: p
children.textContent: Seated, rotate upper body 10 reps each side slowly.

children.name: p
children.textContent: Slow ear-to-shoulder tilts, 3 reps each side.

children.name: p
children.textContent: 11 consecutive days with at least one recovery action completed. Best: 14 days.

children.name: p
children.textContent: Occurred 3× this week. Workouts after 8 PM correlate with 34% worse sleep quality for you.

children.name: p
children.textContent: HRV drops 18% on days with 3+ consecutive meetings. Block a decompression window.

children.name: p
children.textContent: 3 heavy leg sessions in 5 days. Recommend 48-hr lower body rest.

children.name: p
children.textContent: Soreness scores down 32% since you started daily stretching 11 days ago.
